caption: Three people sit on a stage in front of a dark background accented with purple lighting. A man on the left wears a white long-sleeved shirt and dark trousers, sitting with his hands clasped. A woman in the center wears a black short-sleeved shirt and black trousers, sitting with her hands folded in her lap. A man on the right wears a grey suit jacket over a light-colored shirt and grey trousers, gesturing with his right hand as he speaks. Each person sits in a wooden-framed chair. Beside the man on the left is a white, industrial-looking equipment case. Between the woman and the man on the right is another white equipment case. Across the sequence of frames, the man on the right continues to speak and gesture, while the other two remain relatively still, listening. No legible text or logos are visible on the screen.
